message:
fix(node): add state-transition guards to proof generator/scheduler and
fix scenario builder JSON parse error mapping

Proof subsystem hardening:
- proof_generator.rs: add Pending-status guard before transitioning to
  Generating — prevents re-generation of proofs that are already in
  progress, completed, or failed, which could corrupt the proof pipeline
- proof_scheduler.rs: add Dispatched-status guard before marking a job
  as Completed — prevents double-completion or completion of jobs in
  unexpected states (Pending, Cancelled, etc.)

Testing:
- scenario_builder.rs: add proper JsonParse error variant instead of
  misusing EmptyName for JSON deserialization failures — produces
  accurate error messages with the underlying serde_json error details

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
